name: TDWH NetEase English
description: TDWH site-specific English frontend theme forked from NetEase News Inspired. It preserves Qonhub AI data contracts while forcing English UI chrome for www.tdwh.com.
notes: Inspired by NetEase portal, NetEase Health channel, and NetEase article-page layout patterns. Does not copy NetEase assets, content, or proprietary code.
Keeps Qonhub AI Blade variables, SEO meta fields, markdown HTML rendering, category navigation, footer, article routes, and optional article ad data intact.
Reference-only NetEase modules intentionally omitted: login, mailbox/register, app download widgets, comment/share widgets, large external ad slots, and unrelated image-heavy blocks.
Site-specific English UI fork for www.tdwh.com. Article titles, category names, and article body content remain data-driven.
